headline: Why Verified Tip Lines Matter for Newsrooms
subtext: A local newsroom can do everything right on the reporting side and still lose a source at the first step. A person who has seen wrongdoing usually starts with a simpler question than "How does this newsroom handle secure intake?" They ask, "Is this the real t…
